v1_3_0_beta.title: New in the compositor
features: Real-time collaboration — work on a site together with your team
Redesigned workspace with a guided first run
Faster navigation and a clearer publish progress tracker
Safer undo that only affects your own recent edits
fixes: Turning off demo content now works
Editing a brand-new story no longer errors
Renaming a layer button no longer fails
Deleting the site description no longer breaks the page
v1_3_0_beta.thanks_cta: You can help us make Telar and the compositor better by reporting any issues you find too, using the bug button
